mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reports ( report_id, reporter_account_id, target_type, target_account_id, target_donation_id, reason, detail, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{reportId}, #{reporterAccountId}, #{targetType}, #{targetAccountId}, #{targetDonationId}, #{reason}, #{detail}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND target_type = #{targetType}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND target_type = 'ACCOUNT' AND target_donation_id IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND target_type = #{targetType} AND ( (#{targetType} = 'ACCOUNT' AND target_account_id = #{targetId}) OR (#{targetType} = 'DONATION' AND target_donation_id = #{targetId}) )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND target_type = 'ACCOUNT' AND target_donation_id IS NULL AND target_account_id = #{targetAccountId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND target_donation_id = #{donationId}

SELECT report_id, reporter_account_id, target_type, target_account_id, target_donation_id, reason, detail, status, resolved_by, resolved_at, created_at FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND target_type = #{targetType} AND ( (#{targetType} = 'ACCOUNT' AND target_account_id = #{targetId}) OR (#{targetType} = 'DONATION' AND target_donation_id = #{targetId}) ) ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT report_id, reporter_account_id, target_type, target_account_id, target_donation_id, reason, detail, status, resolved_by, resolved_at, created_at FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND target_donation_id = #{donationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reports WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND target_type = #{targetType} AND ( (#{targetType} = 'ACCOUNT' AND target_account_id = #{targetId}) OR (#{targetType} = 'DONATION' AND target_donation_id = #{targetId}) )
